heading: Bonded and Taxpaid Wine Premises
label: F Bonded and Taxpaid Wine Premises
notes: A prior subchapter F, Bonded and Taxpaid Wine Premises, consisted of part I, Establishment, part II, Operations, part III, Cellar Treatment and Classification of Wine, and part IV, General, and comprised sections 5351 to 5357, 5361 to 5373, 5381 to 5388, and 5391 to 5392, respectively, prior to the general revision of this chapter by , , .Pub. L. 85–859, title II, § 20172 Stat. 1313Sept. 2, 1958
